case_title: EDWARD WILSON VS. OHLHOFF RECOVERY PROGRAMS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-19-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY OHLHOFF RECOVERY PROGRAMS IS GRANTED. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE, THE PARTIES HAVING AGREED TO SETTLE WITH A MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS AGAINST EACH OTHER. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER "GRANTED" ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS (MOTION TO VACATED) HEARING FILED BY THE PLAINTIFF. THE COURT GRANTS LEAVE TO FILE THIS LATE REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE.
